zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Tudenham於1295年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親Robert Tudenham32歲，母親Eve Peche36歲。他於1325年與Katherine De Pateshull在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年8月9日在英國諾福爾可海福德享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Tudenham于1295年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，他的父亲Robert Tudenham32岁，母亲Eve Peche36岁。他于1325年与Katherine De Pateshull在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年8月9日在英国諾福爾可海福德享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tudenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tuddenham
meanings: English: locative name, principally from from East or West Tuddenham (Norfolk), but also from Tuddenham (Suffolk) or Tuddenham Saint Martin (Suffolk).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Tudenham was born in 1295, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Tudenham, was 32 and his mother, Eve Peche, was 36. He married Katherine De Pateshull in 1325, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 August 1361, in Haynford, Norfolk, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Tudenham est né en 1295, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Tudenham, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eve Peche, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Katherine De Pateshull en 1325, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 août 1361, à Haynford, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Tudenham 1295 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Tudenham 32 und seine Mutter Eve Peche 36. Er hat 1325 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Katherine De Pateshull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. August 1361 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Haynford, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Tudenham è nato il nel 1295 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Tudenham, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Eve Peche, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Katherine De Pateshull nel 1325, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 agosto 1361, nel Haynford, Norfolk, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Tudenhamが1295年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Robert Tudenhamは32歳，母Eve Pecheは36歳であった。1325年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでKatherine De Pateshullと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年8月9日にイギリスノーフォルクヘインフォードで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Tudenham(이)가 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Tudenham(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Eve Peche(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Katherine De Pateshull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 8월 9일 영국 노르폴크 헤이퍼드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Tudenham nasceu em 1295, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Tudenham, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eve Peche, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine De Pateshull em 1325, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1361, em Haynford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Tudenham родился в 1295 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Tudenham было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eve Peche, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine De Pateshull в 1325 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 августа 1361 г. в местности хеинфорд, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Tudenham nació en 1295, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Tudenham, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eve Peche, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Katherine De Pateshull en 1325, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1361, en Haynford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
